name: Caramel Cinnamon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease muffin pans.
2. In each muffin cup, add 1/2 teaspoon of butter and 1 teaspoon of brown sugar.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Beat the egg; then add milk and melted shortening to the dry ingredients.
5. Add the remaining 1/2 cup of brown sugar to the mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Fill prepared muffin pans about 3/4 full.
7. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 20 minutes.
8. Makes 18 muffins. Optionally, chopped nuts or raisins can be added to the butter and brown sugar in each cup.
